title: On John Bushby.
content:
Here lies John Bushby, honest man!
        Cheat him, Devil, gin ye can.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Burns, titled "On John Bushby.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
